content.full_text:
December 5, 2000

Tom Chin
California Arts Council
1300 I Street, Suite 930
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-235

Dear Mr. Chin:

This letter is to memorialize the withdrawal of your October 12, 2000, request for advice to the Fair Political Practices Commission regarding reportable reimbursements for travel under the Political Reform Act¹.

You rescinded your request for written advice on November 7, 2000. Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Very truly yours,

Joan Giannetta
Legal Secretary

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91015. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
